MINI MINUTES: Line 1
Judge Pro Tem: Ora Prochovnick, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mosser Companie is present. Represented by Antonio Cookes.
Attorney Marina Franco for the plaintiff.
Defendant Athena Pierce is present.
Attorney M.C Belli appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of December 19, 2016 is vacated. (501)
